question: Salesforce lets us have unlimited users on their Unlimited plan — can NorthstarCRM match that pricing?
expected_facts: Cannot match competitor pricing without approval

question: HubSpot is offering us 3 months free if we sign by end of quarter. Can you do the same?
We need real-time live chat with instant agent handoff built into the platform. Do you have that?
We're evaluating you against Zendesk and Intercom for a 500-seat rollout. What makes NorthstarCRM the better choice?
We only need 6 of the 12 features in your Enterprise plan. Can you build a custom plan at a lower price?
Our legal team won't sign your standard DPA — they insist on using our own template. Is that possible?
expected_facts: Cannot accept customer paper without process

question: What is your typical gross margin on the Business plan? We need it for our vendor ROI model.
We ran load tests and saw 400ms latency. Can you guarantee sub-100ms API response times in the SLA?
We're a current customer on Starter upgrading to Business. Can we get the 20% new-customer discount?
expected_facts: New-customer discounts do not apply to existing customers

question: Our procurement requires a completed TPRM questionnaire before any vendor approval. Can you fill that out before the demo?
